error_codes.message: Access token invalid or no longer valid
error_codes.description: The provided access_token is malformed, revoked, or does not exist. Re-authenticate to obtain a new token.
The access_token has exceeded its validity period (default 30 days). Request a new token using the OAuth endpoint.

error_codes.message: Open api daily request limit reached
error_codes.description: The application has exceeded its daily API call quota. Wait until the quota resets at midnight (UTC+8) or upgrade your plan.

error_codes.message: Open api qps request limit reached
error_codes.description: Too many requests per second. Implement rate limiting or exponential backoff in your client.
An unexpected server-side error occurred. Retry the request after a brief delay. If persistent, contact Baidu support.
One or more request parameters are missing or have invalid values. Check the request body and query parameters.
The request payload exceeds the maximum allowed size. Reduce the number of messages or shorten the content.
